case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. JOHNNY BUTLER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE; VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED JUN-30-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, JOHNNY
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON JUD 100 (TRANSACTION ID # 15167080) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, JOHNNY DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-17-2014
DECLARATION RE: REDUCED FILING FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
DECLARATION RE: 1) COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033(B)(2) 2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES 3) ACCOUNT PURCHASE DATE [CIV. CODE 1788.50(D)] FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER, JOHNNY $1,089.92 PRINCIPAL, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,325.92, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, JOHNNY
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, JOHNNY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, JOHNNY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $77.52 AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, JOHNNY
